title: Computes line-by-line differences between two strings using LCS algorithm
purpose: Compares two string inputs and generates a detailed diff showing added, deleted, and unchanged lines with their line numbers.
module_context: Exports a DiffLine interface and a computeLineDiff function that implements the longest common subsequence algorithm to determine line-level differences between strings.

steps.content: IF the two input strings are identical, return all lines as unchanged with corresponding line numbers.
Split both input strings into arrays of lines.
Initialize a dynamic programming table to store longest common subsequence values.
Fill the dynamic programming table by comparing lines from both arrays.
Traverse the dynamic programming table to build the diff output by comparing lines.
Process remaining lines from the old string as deletions.
Process remaining lines from the new string as additions.
Return the complete diff array with all line changes and their types.
